_comment: Tracks skill versions across devices. Hash is MD5 of SKILL.md source. Bootstrap protocol (bsync.sh) compares this against installed versions.

tnb-digest.changelog: Initial release — TNB Slack Weekly Community Digest. Two-phase manual pipeline: Phase 1 reads 7 days across the 5 TNB community channels via the first-party Slack MCP, filters Builder Bot daily-recap posts + ops noise, and presents a categorized NUMBERED pickable digest inline in Cowork (plus emailed record + DM confirmation). Phase 2 ('render N,N,N') turns Brian's picks into raw narrative + expansion angles in a markdown draft (low-voice, not create-content). Private to Brian; read-only on Slack, never posts community-facing. Carries the daily-recap v2 naming/anti-editorializing rules (name every replier, no anonymous framing, neutral tone).

comms.changelog: Added real auto-send for Email channel via Gmail Apps Script + hidden HTML marker. Skill now defaults to send mode (email delivered in ~5 min); draft-only mode is opt-in via explicit 'draft' keyword. Apps Script source at bhub/apps-script/claude-auto-send.gs — one-time deployment in Gmail required.

create-content.changelog: Workflow refactor (Path A as explicit default, multi-section scaffolding rule, scope confirmation for Path B). Added pre-delivery checklist (negation-pivot, magazine-piece framing, stock-phrase slop, accuracy, verbatim test). New Step 1.5 (voice exemplar protocol). style-guide.md gains magazine-piece framing and stock-phrase slop entries under Construction anti-patterns. Driven by post-mortem on TNB Ep1-3 podcast newsletter session, where Path A drift to Path B compounded across segments.

dev-deploy.changelog: Library Awareness (Context7) section added — Claude now auto-invokes the Context7 MCP server on any code work that touches a documented external library (Next.js, Tailwind, Firebase, Vercel KV, Resend, Beehiiv, etc.), pulling current docs into context before writing. Eliminates the stale-API class of bugs (canonical example: Apr 23 builder-bot KV env-var rename). User does not need to invoke 'use context7' manually.

expert.changelog: Added Consequence Check & Red Team layer — auto-triggers adversarial audit on high-stakes recommendations via 3-lens evaluation (direct downside, coherence risk, unforeseeable surface area)

frontend-design.changelog: Initial install — official anthropics/claude-code frontend-design skill. Forces design direction commitment before code, bans Inter/Roboto/Arial, eliminates AI-slop generic UI. Source: github.com/anthropics/claude-code/plugins/frontend-design

handoff.changelog: Registry expanded to enroll sibling repos that live alongside B-Suite under ~/Developer/ (muscle-anatomy, saturn-v-anatomy, B-Personal). Closes the fleet-audit gap where local copies of those repos could drift behind GitHub without bsync ever flagging it. Registry table now includes a Location column. New Device Setup clones both B-Suite repos and the three siblings.

hc-strategy.changelog: Initial release — HC strategic brain with operating plan, expert research, quarterly review protocol. Hash corrected April 9 to match actual source.
hc-strategy.archived_note: Superseded by tnb-strategy as of April 3, 2026. Repo remains for reference but no longer actively maintained.

pm.changelog: UX Standards binding — canonical reference is now `bhub/UX-STANDARDS.md` (cross-device via git), not the skill-bundled copy. Briefs must cite the bhub path and list a `Deviations from the standards` block; unreviewed deviations block APPROVED status. New edge case: if a build introduces a pattern the standards don't cover, the standards doc must be updated (not silently invented). The bundled `references/ux-standards.md` is now a fallback pointer.

priority-startup-intel.changelog: Major editorial recalibration after Brian feedback that briefings drifted toward mega-cap + Series-D-heavy content. HARD rules added: (1) Mega-cap cap — Anthropic/OpenAI/MAANG capped at 1 item per briefing, Ecosystem Signal section only, never in lede; Anthropic/OpenAI valuation news automatically excluded. (2) Stage sweet spot reset to pre-seed through Series B/C; Series D+ becomes table stakes requiring a non-obvious angle. (3) Lede Rule — only when 2+ private items share a thesis; never to summarize mega-cap or generic 'heavy deal flow' framing. (4) Item ordering by EDGE not deal size. (5) Stream 2 mandatory — query 8+ VC firm domains + Carta/Walker + YC blog before drafting; ≥60% of items must be Stream 2 or Series C-or-earlier. (6) Item length cap — 2–3 sentences max per item; 10–14 items per day; trade length for count. (7) Pre-flight checklist added to execution flow. (8) CVC framing rule for out-of-scope theses (robotics, AVs, hardware) reframed around in-scope angle.

tnb-strategy.changelog: Updated for repo reorganization (Apr 29 2026). Skill now reads README.md first for canonical vault index, then loads strategy/STRATEGY-CONTEXT.md, strategy/operating-plan.md, brand/POSITIONING-LANGUAGE.md, and brand/tnb-deck.md (markdown export of April 13 Drive deck). Path updates throughout. Drafts/ and ops/ subdirectories noted but not auto-loaded.
